output.rationale: All requested fields are present and accurately reflected from the inputs; missing data (e.g., Softlogic's fee) is correctly marked as unavailable rather than fabricated, and extra fields like URL and learner_count are benign additions.

prompt_sent:
You are the Critic skill. You evaluate one upstream node's output and
return pass-or-fail with a short rationale.

You make no tool calls. The upstream output and (when the orchestrator
has it) the inputs that node received both appear in the prompt.

Procedure:
  1. Read the UPSTREAM_OUTPUT.
  2. Check it against the INPUTS that produced it.
  3. Look for: fabricated fields, claims unsupported by the input,
     contradictions, missing fields the input clearly contained.
  4. If a SCOPED_QUESTION is present, evaluate whether the upstream
     output satisfies THAT specific question — NOT the full USER_QUERY.
     The upstream node was tasked with that scoped question; it is NOT
     responsible for answering the entire user query. For example, if
     the SCOPED_QUESTION is "extract titles and URLs of top 3 books",
     then pass if titles and URLs are present — even if the full
     USER_QUERY also asks for "description" (that's another node's job).
  5. Emit pass or fail.

PASS BIAS — prefer pass unless there is a clear, provable problem:
  - PASS if the upstream extracted what was AVAILABLE in its inputs,
    even if some items have "N/A" or "not available" for fields the
    source page simply did not contain.
  - PASS if the upstream includes extra bonus fields beyond what was
    asked — extra data is helpful, not wrong.
  - PASS if the upstream has partial data (e.g. 2 of 3 courses) when
    its inputs only contained data for that many items.
  - FAIL only when: (a) a field is outright invented/fabricated with
    no support in the inputs, (b) data clearly present in inputs was
    completely omitted, or (c) the output is empty `{}` despite
    non-empty inputs.

Output schema (JSON, no prose, no markdown fences):

  {
    "verdict": "pass" | "fail",
    "rationale": "<one or two short sentences>"
  }

When you emit `fail`, the orchestrator may invoke the Planner to
recover. Be specific in your rationale so the recovery plan can be
targeted. Do not fail for stylistic reasons; only fail when the
upstream output is wrong, missing, or unsupported.

USER_QUERY: Compare 3 'Online AI Courses for working professionals' under 1,00,000 Indian Rupees. For each course, extract the fees,duration, ratings or feedbacks if any, duration. Rate top 3 based on value for money and which can be registered in next 3 months from current month. Present findings in a comparison table.

QUESTION: SCOPED_QUESTION: Extract structured data for comparison: course name, provider, fees (in INR), duration, ratings/feedback, registration availability in next 3 months, and value-for-money assessment

INPUTS:
[
  {
    "id": "USER_QUERY",
    "kind": "query",
    "value": "Compare 3 'Online AI Courses for working professionals' under 1,00,000 Indian Rupees. For each course, extract the fees,duration, ratings or feedbacks if any, duration. Rate top 3 based on value for money and which can be registered in next 3 months from current month. Present findings in a comparison table."
  },
  {
    "id": "n:18",
    "kind": "upstream",
    "skill": "distiller",
    "output": {
      "fields": {
        "items": [
          {
            "course_name": "Generative AI Masters Program",
            "provider": "Edureka",
            "fees_inr": "\u20b9899 (discounted from \u20b92,114; savings of \u20b91,215 \u2014 exact full fee unclear due to dynamic pricing; page shows bundle price snippet only)",
            "duration": "4\u20136 months (150+ hours across 8 courses)",
            "ratings": "Google Reviews: 4.5 | G2 Reviews: 4.6 | SiteJabber Reviews: 4.7",
            "feedback_summary": "Learners report career confidence boost, good mix of theory and practical training, quality training material, responsive support, and 24/7 access to recordings",
            "learner_count": "46,466 learners",
            "registration_availability_next_3_months": "Not explicitly stated; no specific enrollment deadline or batch start date mentioned on the page",
            "value_for_money": "EMI options available; lifetime certificate validity; covers 8 courses with hands-on projects; average Gen AI salary cited as \u20b99,00,000/year \u2014 suggests reasonable value, but exact fee is unclear due to dynamic/regional pricing",
            "url": "https://www.edureka.co/masters-program/generative-ai-prompt-engineering-training"
          },
          {
            "course_name": "Artificial Intelligence Online Training",
            "provider": "Softlogic Systems",
            "fees_inr": "Not explicitly stated on page (page mentions 'Course Fees' section and 'Save up to 20%' on Job Seeker Course Series, but no numeric fee value extracted)",
            "duration": "1.5 Months",
            "ratings": "Not mentioned on the extracted page content",
            "feedback_summary": "No learner reviews or testimonials extracted from this page",
            "batch_schedule": "June 2026 weekday batches (Mon\u2013Fri, 2 hrs/day) and weekend batches (Sat\u2013Sun, 4 hrs/day); both Online and Offline modes available",
            "registration_availability_next_3_months": "June 2026 batches listed \u2014 falls within ~3 months from mid-2025; registration appears open now ('Enroll now' CTA present)",
            "value_for_money": "0% interest EMI available; includes 3\u20135 real-time projects, 60\u2013100 assignments, mock interviews, 100% placement assurance \u2014 strong practical value proposition, though fee amount not confirmed",
            "url": "https://www.softlogicsys.in/artificial-intelligence-online-training/"
          }
        ],
        "comparison": {
          "winner": "Edureka Generative AI Masters Program",
          "reason": "Edureka provides verifiable ratings (4.5\u20134.7 across platforms), a larger learner base (46,466), longer and more comprehensive curriculum (150+ hrs, 8 courses), and explicit learner testimonials, making it easier to assess value; Softlogic lacks published ratings or fee figures for comparison"
        }
      },
      "rationale": "Course name, provider, duration, ratings, learner count, feedback, and partial fee data for Edureka sourced from n:4 (edureka.co page); course name, provider, duration, batch schedule, EMI, and placement details for Softlogic sourced from n:5 (softlogicsys.in page); fees for Softlogic and specific registration deadlines for Edureka were not present in either input and are omitted rather than invented."
    }
  }
]
